doc: Paths here differ from companion-self by documented policy, not accidental drift. They are listed under 'Expected drift' in template_diff output and omitted from the actionable 'differ' bucket. See docs/merging-from-companion-self.md (IFP short form vs full spec).

AGENTS.md.reason: companion-self ships a short portable AGENTS.md (template baseline). Grace-mar holds the full Layer 1 core doctrine, operator menus, coffee/conductor/gate language, and instance rules. Intentional expansion — do not replace this file with the template stub on bulk sync. When upgrading, merge selective guardrail updates from companion-self by hand per MERGING-FROM-COMPANION-SELF.
AGENTS.md.merging_pointer: MERGING-FROM-COMPANION-SELF — §1 Sync classes; canonical template vs instance-only surfaces

docs/identity-fork-protocol.md.reason: Grace-mar holds IFP v1.0 full reference spec; companion-self ships the short form with a link to the full spec. Do not overwrite the instance file with the template short form on bulk sync.
docs/identity-fork-protocol.md.merging_pointer: MERGING-FROM-COMPANION-SELF — Identity Fork Protocol (IFP) — short form vs full spec

users/demo/observability/observability-r.reason: Regenerated by scripts/build-observability-report.py per clone; generatedAt and absolute paths in validationSummary.detail differ while counts and pass/fail are aligned.

docs/skill-work/work-cadence/work-cadenc.reason: Append-only cadence log. Template holds the skeleton (header + append anchor); instances accumulate live event lines. Header format should stay in sync; event data is instance-specific.
docs/skill-work/work-cadence/work-cadenc.merging_pointer: Upstream header changes only; never overwrite instance event data with template skeleton.
